1000650134.english: When I was on assignment, it was really tough, but now that I'm doing radio, it's so great, isn't it?
1000650134.korean: 파견 나갔을 때는 정말 힘들었는데, 이렇게 라디오를 하고 있으니 너무 좋은 거 있죠?

1000650135.english: Listeners, thank you for loving OraOra as much as you do. The more you love it, the less likely I am to be dispatched, so please continue to support us!
1000650135.korean: 청취자 여러분들이 오라오라를 사랑해 주시는 만큼 제가 파견 나갈 일이 적어지니까 계속해서 잘 부탁드립니다~

1000650136.english: Oh dear, I've been talking for too long. Let's move on to the next story!
1000650136.korean: 아차차, 말이 너무 길었네요. 다음 사연으로 넘어갈게요!

1000650137.english: It was great to finally see a concert in person that I had only seen in recordings! And the way you were singing on stage was so cool! For song requests...
1000650137.korean: "기록으로만 봤던 콘서트라는 걸 직접 볼 수 있어서 좋았슴다! 그리고 무대에서 노래하던 모습이 너무 멋있었슴다!" 신청곡으로는...

1000650138.english: Hehe, if you don't know these people on the Orca, you're a spy. Spy!
1000650138.korean: 에헤헷, 오르카 호에서 이분들을 모르면 첩자죠. 첩자!

1000650139.english: Sky Knights & Muse's With You! I'll listen and go!
1000650139.korean: 스카이 나이츠&뮤즈의 With You! 듣고 갈게요!

1000650140.english: ... Looks like it's radio again today. The amount of orangeade always gets me hyped up.
1000650140.korean: ...오늘도 라디오인가 보네요. 오렌지에이드 양은 언제나 텐션이 높군요.

1000650141.english: Anyway, lately the ship's announcements have only been playing songs by the Sky Knights and Muse-san.
1000650141.korean: 그나저나 최근 함내 방송에서는 계속 스카이 나이츠 분들과 뮤즈 양의 노래뿐이네요.

1000650142.english: The songs are good, and those who saw the performance can't forget the excitement of that time.
1000650142.korean: 노래도 좋고, 공연을 본 사람들은 그때의 열기를 잊을 수 없으니까요.

1000650143.english: You hum along often too, don't you? Oh, right.

1000650144.english: About what we were talking about earlier... How's the song?

1000650145.english: What song is this all of a sudden?

1000650146.english: Night Angel, you like to sing, don't you?
1000650146.korean: 나이트 앤젤은 노래 부르는 거 좋아하잖아요?

1000650147.english: That's true, but it's not unrelated to appearance, is it? And I'm not particularly good at it either.
1000650147.korean: 그건 그렇지만, 외모와는 관련이 없지 않습니까. 그다지 잘하는 편도 아니고.

1000650148.english: Appearance isn't the only thing that determines a person's charm, is it? And I know Night Angel's songs well.
1000650148.korean: 외모만이 그 사람의 매력을 정하는 건 아니잖아요? 그리고 나이트 앤젤의 노래는 제가 잘 알아요.

1000650149.english: Now that you say that, I'm really... Horse. Ro. That resonates with me.
1000650149.korean: 당신이 그런 말을 하니 정.말.로. 와닿네요.

1000650150.english: ... Oh, anyway. How Night Angel chooses to accept it is up to them.
1000650150.korean: ...어, 어쨌든. 어떻게 받아들일지는 나이트 앤젤의 몫이에요.

1000650151.english: I need to do some maintenance, so I'll be going now...

1000650159.english: I can't believe there are so many outfits that suit my slender build!
1000650159.korean: 저같이 빈약한 체형에 어울리는 의상이 이렇게나 많았다니...

1000650160.english: I'm glad I borrowed the materials.
1000650160.korean: 자료를 빌려 오길 잘한 것 같네요.

1000650161.english: Cute things aren't my style, so I'll go with this cool outfit instead.
1000650161.korean: 귀여운 건 취향에 맞지 않으니, 이런 멋있는 의상으로 해야겠어요.

1000650162.english: The woman in this magazine looks a bit young, but...
1000650162.korean: 이 잡지 속의 여성은 좀 어린 것 같지만…

1000650163.english: Well, it's cool, so it doesn't matter, right?

1000650164.english: You can design the costumes referring to these, and the songs...
1000650164.korean: 의상은 이것들을 참고해서 디자인하면 되고, 노래는…

1000650165.english: What should the topic be? Love story?

1000650166.english: Ugh. Just thinking about love stories makes me feel inexplicably suffocated.
1000650166.korean: 윽. 사랑 이야기는 생각만 해도 괜히 답답한데.

1000650167.english: ... Let's listen to some other songs first.

1000650169.english: ... Hey, Night Angel? Are you going to keep singing like that without lyrics?
1000650169.korean: ...저기 나이트 앤젤? 계속 가사 없이 그렇게 부를 건가요?

1000650170.english: There's nothing we can do about it, is there? The melody is there, but I can't think of any lyrics right now.
1000650170.korean: 어쩔 수 없지 않습니까. 멜로디는 나왔어도 당장 떠오르는 가사가 없는데.

1000650171.english: I'm still using it for now, but... I don't like it at all.
1000650171.korean: 일단 계속 쓰고는 있지만... 영 마음에 들지 않네요.

1000650172.english: It's good to relax, but you know there's not much time left until the performance, right?
1000650172.korean: 여유 부리는 것은 좋지만, 공연 날까지 시간이 얼마 남지 않았다는 건 알고 있죠?

1000650173.english: How could I forget? As soon as the commander said he was building a performance hall, you sold me out, didn't you?
1000650173.korean: 어떻게 잊겠나요. 사령관이 공연장을 만든다고 말하자마자 저를 팔아먹었잖습니까.

1000650174.english: You made a performance appointment without even asking me...
1000650174.korean: 제게 묻지도 않고, 갑자기 공연 약속을 잡다니...

1000650175.english: I, I thought I could be helpful to Night Angel...
1000650175.korean: 저, 저는 나이트 앤젤에게 도움이 될 거라고 생각해서...

1000650176.english: Sigh... I'll take care of it from now on.

1000650177.english: Well, I guess I should think of it as an opportunity to showcase my charm.
1000650177.korean: 뭐, 그래도 매력을 어필할 기회라고 생각해야겠군요.

1000650178.english: That's right, isn't it? As expected, I got a good opportunity-
1000650178.korean: 그, 그렇죠? 역시 제가 좋은 기회를-

1000650179.english: Stop talking nonsense and just give me the notebook.
1000650179.korean: 이상한 소리 하지 말고 거기 노트나 주세요.

1000650180.english: Tch... Here. I should sit down and rest for a bit too.
1000650180.korean: 치... 여기요. 저도 잠깐 앉아서 쉬어야겠어요.

1000650181.english: But where are the clothes you said you were going to make?
1000650181.korean: 그런데 만든다고 했던 의상은 어디 있나요?

1000650182.english: That thing you're sitting on is my costume.
1000650182.korean: 당신이 깔고 앉은 그게 제 의상입니다.

1000650184.english: Since I'm not good with my hands, there's nothing I can do about it. Or will you make it for me instead?
1000650184.korean: 손재주가 좋지 않으니 별수 없잖습니까. 아니면 대신 만들어 줄 건가요?

1000650185.english: I'm not really into that kind of thing either...

1000650186.english: Tsk. There's no other choice. There's no choice but to keep making them.
1000650186.korean: 쯧. 어쩔 수 없군요. 계속 만들어 보는 수밖에.

1000650187.english: Did you check the costume department to see if they have anything similar?

1000650188.english: I've already looked, but most of them aren't suitable for me.
1000650188.korean: 이미 찾아봤지만 대부분 제게 맞지 않더군요.

1000650189.english: Then, how about asking Ms. Audrey...?
1000650189.korean: 그럼 오드리 양에게 부탁해 보는 건...

1000650190.english: This is something I'm doing purely because I want to.
1000650190.korean: 이번 일은 순전히 제가 하고 싶어서 하는 일입니다.

1000650191.english: So, I can't ask anyone else.
1000650191.korean: 그러니 다른 사람들에게 부탁할 수는 없죠.

1000650192.english: Anyway, Ms. Audrey is busy right now and won't be able to take on any new orders.
1000650192.korean: 어차피 오드리 양은 지금 바빠서 수주받을 수는 없을 거고요.

1000650193.english: Yes, that's right. Ms. Audrey definitely said she was busy, didn't she? But we'll need stage costumes... Oh!
1000650193.korean: 그, 그랬었죠. 오드리 양은 분명 바쁘다고 했었죠. 하지만 무대 의상은 필요할 텐데... 아!

1000650194.english: How about borrowing clothes from other people? This person's clothes here are also nicer than I expected, so I think it would be okay.
1000650194.korean: 다른 분들의 옷을 빌리는 건 어떨까요? 여기 이분의 옷도 생각보다 예뻐서 괜찮을 것 같은데요

1000650195.english: Are you talking about other people's clothes? That's a good idea, but...
1000650195.korean: 다른 분들의 옷 말인가요. 괜찮은 생각입니다만-

1000650196.english: Aren't these two people also pretty? Wouldn't it be nice if you could wear clothes like this?
1000650196.korean: 이분이랑 이분도 예쁘죠? 이런 옷을 입을 수 있다면 좋지 않을까요?

1000650197.english: I think I forgot something, isn't everyone taller than me?
1000650197.korean: 한 가지 잊은 것 같은데, 모두 저보다 크지 않나요?

1000650198.english: Huh? Oh, come to think of it...

1000650199.english: Ha. Ha. Ha. In the end, idols are all about their chests, aren't they? Is it the law of the world that the bigger your chest, the more popular you are?
1000650199.korean: 하.하.하. 결국 아이돌도 가슴이군요. 가슴이 클수록 인기도 많은 것이 세상의 법칙인 걸까요.

1000650200.english: I don't have any clothes that fit because of my chest, and I'm not good with my hands, so I can't even make clothes that fit.
1000650200.korean: 저는 가슴 때문에 사이즈에 맞는 옷도 없고, 손재주도 안 좋아서 맞는 옷을 만들지도 못하는데.

1000650201.english: As expected, being an idol was too much of a desire for someone like me.
1000650201.korean: 역시 저 같은 것에게 아이돌은 과한 욕심이었어요.

1000650202.english: To become an idol just to sing, and to try to appeal with just singing, that's quite a dream.
1000650202.korean: 애초에 노래를 부르기 위해서 아이돌이 되겠다니, 겨우 노래로 매력을 어필하려고 하다니 꿈도 야무지지.

1000650203.english: Don't say things like that. Have confidence in your abilities.
1000650203.korean: 그런 말 하지 말아요. 자기 능력에 자신감을 가지세요.

1000650204.english: Night Angel's songs are good enough. That's something not just I know, but all the Doom Bringers know -
1000650204.korean: 나이트 앤젤의 노래는 충분히 좋다고요. 그건 저뿐만 아니라 둠 브링어 모두가 알고 있고-

1000650205.english: Then. What are you saying I should do? There are several problems beside just the clothes right now.
1000650205.korean: 그럼. 어떻게 하라는 말인가요. 당장 옷 말고도 여러 문제가 있는데.

1000650206.english: Hoo... Let's cool off a bit first. Would you like to go for a walk together?
1000650206.korean: 후... 우선 좀 머리를 식히죠. 같이 산책이라도 할래요?

1000650207.english: Go ahead. I'll think about it a bit more.
1000650207.korean: 다녀오시죠. 저는 좀 더 고민해 보겠습니다.

1000650209.english: Night Angel. The package has arrived.

1000650210.english: Package? I didn't order anything separately.

1000650212.english: ... Call me if you need any help.

1000650214.english: There's no sender... Is this a note?

1000650216.english: ...... A cheering note with no sender and the finished version of the outfit I was working on.
1000650216.korean: ......발신인이 없는 응원 쪽지랑, 만들고 있던 의상의 완성판이라.

1000650217.english: Heh heh, there's only one person who would pull something like this.
1000650217.korean: 후후, 이런 일을 벌일 사람은 한 명밖에 없겠죠.

1000650219.english: Seriously. I only wanted to show you my best side...
1000650219.korean: 정말이지. 당신에겐 멋진 모습만 보여주고 싶었는데...

1000650220.english: No. You love me just the way I am, no matter what I look like, and yet I was only concerned with how others saw me.
1000650220.korean: 아뇨. 제가 어떤 모습이라도 당신은 이렇게 좋아해 주는데, 저는 다른 사람의 모습만 신경 썼다니.

1000650221.english: I feel like such a fool.

1000650222.english: But you'll still stay like this, right?
1000650222.korean: 그래도 당신은 계속 이렇게 있어 줄 거죠?

1000650223.english: You keep doing this to me...

1000650224.english: ... Heh heh. Let's get started. Since a good lyric has come to mind, let's hurry.
1000650224.korean: ...후훗. 어서 시작하죠. 좋은 가사가 떠올랐으니, 서두릅시다.

1000650225.english: Because I need to invite the kind person who helped me to the performance.
1000650225.korean: 도와주신 고마운 분을 공연에 초대해야 하니까요.

1000650226.english: - A while ago, while organizing the interior of the Orca, we converted one of the remaining areas into a small performance space.
1000650226.korean: - 얼마 전 오르카 호 내부를 정리하면서 남는 구역 하나를 작은 공연장으로 개조했다.

1000650227.english: - I often stopped by when I had time, but today's performance was...
1000650227.korean: - 시간이 나면 종종 들리긴 했지만, 오늘의 공연은...

1000650229.english: - Night Angel, who was in her stage costume and checking the choreography, approached me.
1000650229.korean: - 무대 의상을 입고 동선을 체크하고 있던 나이트 앤젤이 내게 다가왔다.

1000650230.english: It's okay. It was just time for a break.

1000650231.english: ...... Yes. Because someone helped me a lot.

1000650232.english: - Night Angel chuckled at my stiff, mechanical-sounding answer.
1000650232.korean: - 기계음처럼 뻣뻣한 내 대답에 나이트 앤젤은 피식 웃었다.

1000650233.english: You're right. It would be nice if they would at least show their face.

1000650234.english: - Embarrassed by the gaze that was looking at me with a slight smile, I averted my eyes. The Night Angel then took another step closer to me.
1000650234.korean: - 살짝 미소를 머금고 나를 바라보는 시선에 민망해져서 눈을 피하자, 나이트 앤젤은 한 걸음 더 내게 다가왔다.

1000650235.english: If you happen to meet the person who helped me this time, could you please pass on a message?
1000650235.korean: 혹시 이번에 저를 도와주신 분을 만나시면, 말을 좀 전해주실 수 있나요?

1000650236.english: ... I've lived pessimistically, obsessing over what I didn't have.
1000650236.korean: ...저는 여태껏 제가 가지지 못한 것에 집착하면서 비관적으로 살았어요.

1000650237.english: While worrying about what others think... Without even looking at myself, I just...
1000650237.korean: 다른 사람의 시선을 신경 쓰면서... 제 자신을 돌아보지도 않고 그저...

1000650238.english: I only ever put myself down.

1000650239.english: But my thinking has changed a bit now.

1000650240.english: Sometimes it's a hassle, but there are also people who give sincere advice...
1000650240.korean: 가끔 귀찮긴 해도 진심 어린 조언을 해주는 사람도 있고...

1000650241.english: I don't know who it is, but there are people who like me.
1000650241.korean: 누군지는 모르지만, 저를 좋아해 주는 사람도 있으니까요.

1000650242.english: - Night Angel slowly embraced me, wrapping her hands around my waist.
1000650242.korean: - 나이트 앤젤은 두 손을 내 허리에 감으며 천천히 내게 안겼다.

1000650243.english: - I could feel my heart pounding beneath the magnificent costume.
1000650243.korean: - 멋진 의상 너머로 두근거리는 심장 박동이 느껴졌다.

1000650245.english: Not just this stage, but everything.

1000650246.english: - I bowed my head and slowly brought my face closer to Night Angel.
1000650246.korean: - 고개를 숙여 나이트 앤젤에게 천천히 얼굴을 가까이했다.

1000650247.english: - As her slightly damp red eyes slowly closed and the sweet scent of shampoo tickled my nostrils, something soft touched my lips.
1000650247.korean: - 살짝 물기가 있는 붉은 눈동자가 스르르 감기고, 달콤한 샴푸 냄새가 코끝을 간질이는 순간 입술에 부드러운 무언가가 닿았다.

1000650249.english: - Just before our lips touched, Night Angel pushed me away with her fingertips and turned toward the stage.
1000650249.korean: - 입술이 닿기 직전 손끝으로 날 밀어낸 나이트 앤젤은 몸을 돌려 무대로 향했다.

1000650250.english: We've already had the rehearsal, but it wouldn't hurt to do a preview performance or something like that.
1000650250.korean: 리허설은 이미 했지만, 사전 공연 정도는 또 해도 되겠죠.

1000650251.english: ...... Because I want to show it to the person I love the most, first.
1000650251.korean: ......제가 가장 사랑하는 사람에게, 제일 먼저 보여주고 싶으니까요.

1000650253.english: - The spotlights turn on one by one, illuminating her.

1000650254.english: - Small lights gather to fill the concert hall, and Night Angel takes the stage, shining brightly.
1000650254.korean: - 작은 빛이 모여 공연장을 가득 채우고, 밝게 빛나는 무대 위로 나이트 앤젤이 올라선다.

1000650255.english: - In a not-so-large venue, I was the only audience member.
1000650255.korean: - 그리 크지 않은 공연장에, 관객이라고는 나 하나뿐.

1000650256.english: - But as if that were enough, Night Angel, with a slight smile, took a small breath.
1000650256.korean: - 하지만 그걸로 충분하다는 듯이, 살짝 미소 지은 나이트 앤젤은 작게 숨을 들이마셨다.

1000650257.english: - A melody and lyrics that have nothing to do with love.

1000650258.english: - But in the voice of the Night angel singing on the shining stage,
1000650258.korean: - 하지만 빛나는 무대에 올라 노래하는 밤천사의 목소리에는,

1000650259.english: - It was filled with affection for me.
1000650259.korean: - 나를 향한 애정이 가득 담겨 있었다.

1000650261.english: I won't push myself too hard. Thank you, Hirume.

1000650271.english: You worked hard too, Hirume. But...

1000650274.english: Should I go ahead? I'll leave a little later.
1000650274.korean: 먼저 가 있을래? 난 조금 더 있다 갈게.

1000650280.english: No, it's okay. Thank you for your concern.

1000650283.english: I really didn't want to use this...

1000650285.english: You said you'd grant any wish, didn't you?

1000650286.english: Please, Hachiko. What did you talk about with Hirume?
1000650286.korean: 부탁할게, 하치코. 히루메랑 무슨 얘길 했어?

1000650288.english: Do you know where Hirume went?

1000650289.english: Earlier, as in a few hours ago?

1000650290.english: Yeah. I'm going to meet you now.

1000650291.english: But since I don't know where the meeting place is...

1000650298.english: If you give me permission, I'd be happy to.

1000650301.english: Yeah, you're right. It's brighter than it looked from below, probably because we're at the top of the mountain.
1000650301.korean: 그러게. 산 정상이라 그런지 아래에서 보던 것보다 밝네.

1000650304.english: Are you cold? Should we go back?

1000650306.english: I'm sorry for interrupting your practice.

1000650308.english: Oh, really? I don't know who it is, but I'm really grateful.

1000650315.english: This male protagonist might have a similar personality to the producer...

1000650319.english: It was there. Can I come in?

1000650322.english: You don't need to be afraid. I don't intend to be harsh with non-combat personnel.
1000650322.korean: 어려워할 필요 없어. 비전투 인원한테 딱딱하게 대할 생각은 없으니까.

1000650324.english: Hmm. It definitely looks like a musician's room.
1000650324.korean: 흠. 확실히 음악하는 애 방 같네.

1000650325.english: Instruments here and there, sheet music everywhere...

1000650326.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'll clean it up right away...

1000650327.english: Don't worry, I didn't say anything.
1000650327.korean: 뭐라고 한 거 아니니까 신경쓰지 마.

1000650329.english: ...But what are you doing in my room?

1000650337.english: Yeah. It would be even better if you could also teach simple instrument playing. Something like a guitar.
1000650337.korean: 응. 간단한 악기 연주도 알려주면 더 좋고. 기타 같은 거.

1000650338.english: The guitar... isn't simple at all, is it...?

1000650340.english: ...but it's okay. Because I'm going to practice.

1000650343.english: Me, Captain May is... isn't she very busy...?
1000650343.korean: 메, 메이 대장님은… 많이 바쁘시지 않나요…?

1000650344.english: It's busy, but I'll do it anyway.

1000650346.english: Please help me sing a song with sincerity. Please.
1000650346.korean: 지, 진심을 담은 노래를 할 수 있게 도와줘. 부탁할게.

1000650350.english: A noble lady falling in love with a soldier.
1000650350.korean: 귀족 영애랑 군인이랑 사랑에 빠지는 거.

1000650351.english: Do you, do you know this novel...?

1000650352.english: I saw it recently because Harpyia recommended it.

1000650353.english: Oh, I also got this on Mr. Harpe's recommendation...
1000650353.korean: 아, 저도 이건 하르페 씨 추천으로…

1000650354.english: You read a lot of romance novels too, huh? Huh? Did you see this too? How was it?
1000650354.korean: 너도 연애 소설 많이 보는구나. 어? 이것도 봤어? 어땠어?

1000650356.english: ...I only thought you were scary, but it turns out we have a lot in common...

1000650359.english: So you can sing a song with your heart... I will definitely help you.
1000650359.korean: 진심을 담은 노래를 부르실 수 있도록… 제가 꼭 도와드릴게요.

1000650360.english: So, for the time being, we'll be cooperating with the Sky Knights to patrol the area-
1000650360.korean: 그래서, 당분간 스카이나이츠와 협력해서 정찰 구역을-

1000650362.english: - Lost in thought, I snapped back to reality and saw May looking up at me with a displeased expression.
1000650362.korean: - 상념에 빠졌다 정신을 차려보니, 메이가 못마땅하다는 얼굴로 올려다보고 있었다.

1000650363.english: What are you thinking about? I'm just explaining the operation plan.
1000650363.korean: 무슨 생각을 하고 있는 거야? 기껏 작전 계획 설명하는데.

1000650364.english: - May has no idea I was lost in thought because of her.
1000650364.korean: - 메이는 내가 딴생각에 빠진 게 본인 때문이란걸 꿈에도 모르겠지.

1000650365.english: ...I'll explain it again. This time, listen carefully.

1000650366.english: - It's already been over two years since I met May.

1000650367.english: - Their bumpy first meeting and the happenings after May realizes her feelings as a girl.
1000650367.korean: - 순탄치 않았던 첫만남과, 메이가 자신의 소녀로서의 마음을 깨닫고 나서의 해프닝들.

1000650369.english: - Although May has shown many different sides, lately she feels quite different from before.
1000650369.korean: - 여러가지 모습을 보여준 메이지만, 요즘은 지금까지와는 사뭇 다른 느낌이다.

1000650371.english: - May, who doesn't hide her shyness and affection while still maintaining her former confidence, is truly-
1000650371.korean: - 쑥쓰러움과 호감을 숨기지 않으면서도, 예전의 당당한 모습을 유지하는 메이는 정말로-

1000650373.english: - The sound of May slamming her desk brought me back to reality.
1000650373.korean: - 메이가 책상을 탕 내려치는 소리에 다시 현실로 돌아왔다.

1000650375.english: You seem to be having trouble concentrating. Just do it next time.
1000650375.korean: 영 집중이 안되는 모양이네. 그냥 다음에 해.

1000650376.english: It was all already decided anyway, I was just going to deliver the message.
1000650376.korean: 어차피 다 확정된 거였고, 그냥 전달만 하려고 한 거니까.

1000650378.english: - May cut me off and took a small, deep breath.
1000650378.korean: - 메이는 내 말을 자르고 작게 심호흡했다.

1000650379.english: - At first, I saw the old May, who seemed passive and shy, but soon her unwavering gaze turned toward me.
1000650379.korean: - 언뜻 소극적이고 부끄럼 많은, 예전의 메이가 보였지만, 곧 흔들림없는 시선이 내게 향했다.

1000650380.english: Are you busy after we dock this afternoon?

1000650383.english: ...because I want to be alone with you.

1000650384.english: - As I just blinked my eyes in a daze, the corners of May's eyes began to tremble slightly.
1000650384.korean: - 황망하게 눈만 깜빡이고 있자니, 메이의 눈가가 가늘게 떨렸다.

1000650385.english: Um, if you don't like it... just...

1000650387.english: Then I'll see you at the small harbor north of the scheduled docking location.
1000650387.korean: 그럼 정박 예정지 북쪽에 작은 항구에서 봐.

1000650388.english: Please land only after securing safety in the adjacent areas.
1000650388.korean: 꼭 인접 지역까지 안전 확보되면 상륙하고.

1000650390.english: - After the Orca docked and the crew deboarded to secure the area and search for supplies, they landed on the mainland.
1000650390.korean: - 오르카 호가 정박하고, 대원들이 지역 확보와 물자 탐색을 위해 출격한 뒤 육지에 내렸다.

1000650391.english: - After arriving at the meeting place and watching the sun sink below the horizon for a few minutes, I heard footsteps behind me.
1000650391.korean: - 약속 장소에 도착해 수평선 너머로 가라앉는 해를 바라보길 몇 분, 등 뒤에서 발소리가 들렸다.

1000650394.english: - May, dressed in comfortable casual clothes, plopped down next to me.
1000650394.korean: - 편안한 사복을 걸친 메이가 내 옆에 털썩 앉았다.

1000650395.english: It's non-alcoholic, so don't worry. I'm just going to set the mood.
1000650395.korean: 무알콜이니까 걱정 마. 그냥 분위기만 낼 거야.

1000650396.english: - I took the can of beer May handed me and sat down next to her.
1000650396.korean: - 메이가 건낸 맥주캔을 받아 나도 메이 옆에 자리를 잡았다.

1000650399.english: - Aside from the faint voices of the crew members heard in the distance, there's only the gentle sound of the waves.
1000650399.korean: - 멀리서 어렴풋이 들려오는 대원들이 말소리를 제외하곤, 잔잔한 파도소리 뿐이다.

1000650401.english: I... why did I ask to meet you alone...?
1000650401.korean: 내가… 왜 단 둘이 만나자고 했는지…

1000650403.english: - A trembling voice, flushed cheeks, and even alcohol and a guitar to set the mood.
1000650403.korean: - 떨리는 목소리와 달아오른 볼, 그리고 분위기를 잡기 위한 술과 기타까지.

1000650404.english: - Before I could even answer, May gently took my hand.
1000650404.korean: - 미처 대답하기도 전에, 메이가 조심스레 손을 잡았다.

1000650406.english: My heart feels like it's going to burst.

1000650408.english: Well, I was just clumsy back then! This and that...

1000650410.english: - As I approached, May didn't resist and embraced me.
1000650410.korean: - 내가 다가가자 메이는 저항하지 않고 품에 안겼다.

1000650411.english: - May, who had been burying her nose in my chest and fiddling with my clothes for a while, pulled away with a bright red face.
1000650411.korean: - 한동안 내 가슴팍에 코를 묻고 옷자락을 만지작거리던 메이가 새빨개진 얼굴로 몸을 뗐다.

1000650412.english: If this keeps up, I'll be cuddling all day.

1000650414.english: - Not just the guitar, but I remembered that Sleipnir had told me that the fortress Harpyia and the Muses often hung out with Mayra.
1000650414.korean: - 기타 뿐만이 아니라, 슬레이프니르에게 요새 하르페이아와 뮤즈가 메이랑 자주 어울린다는 이야기를 들었던 것을 떠올렸다.

1000650416.english: - May's fingers, holding the guitar, were wrapped in bandages.
1000650416.korean: - 기타를 잡는 메이의 손가락에는 밴드가 감겨있었다.

1000650417.english: This time, if you get distracted like before... I'm really going to get angry.
1000650417.korean: 이번에는 아까처럼 딴 생각하면… 진짜 화 낼 거야.

1000650418.english: - Smiling faintly and making a joke that wasn't quite a joke, May gently closed her eyes and began to sing.
1000650418.korean: - 살풋웃으며 농담같지 않은 농담을 건넨 메이는, 살며시 눈을 감고 노래하기 시작했다.

1000650420.english: - But thanks to that, the emotions contained in the lyrics and melody are conveyed without any embellishment.
1000650420.korean: - 하지만 그것 덕분에 가사와 멜로디에 담긴 감정이 가감없이 전해져온다.

1000650422.english: - When our eyes met while she was singing, May's bashful smile made me involuntarily hold my breath.
1000650422.korean: - 노래하며 눈이 마주치자 배시시 웃는 메이의 모습에 나도 모르게 숨을 삼켰다.

1000650423.english: - Just like the lyrics, which she must have written herself...

1000650424.english: - As if trying to convey her sincerity, May's captivating purple eyes, which seemed to draw you in, were fixed on me until the song ended.
1000650424.korean: - 마치 진심을 전하려는 듯, 빨려들어갈 것 같은 메이의 보랏빛 눈동자는 노래가 끝날때까지 나만을 바라보고 있었다.

1000650426.english: - After the song ended, May asked cautiously.

1000650428.english: - Seeing May lower her gaze and blush, I decided to answer in a different way.
1000650428.korean: - 시선을 내리깔고 볼을 붉히는 메이를 보며, 다른 방식으로 대답하기로 했다.

1000650429.english: I practiced hard in my own way...?!

1000650430.english: - The body of May, held in my arms, stiffened with tension, confusion, and surprise.
1000650430.korean: - 품에 안은 메이의 몸이 긴장과 당황, 놀람으로 빳빳하게 굳어졌다.

1000650431.english: - A kiss like a child's, where lips simply touch.
1000650431.korean: - 단순히 입술을 맞댈 뿐인 어린아이 같은 키스.

1000650432.english: - Slowly, their lips parted, and May, letting out a small gasp...
1000650432.korean: - 천천히 입술이 떨어지고, 작게 탄성을 내뱉은 메이는…

1000650433.english: What, what are you doing, you idiot commander!

1000650434.english: Of course I wouldn't hate it! That's not it!

1000650435.english: ... Before that... I had something to say...

1000650436.english: - After fidgeting with her fingers for a moment, May finally looked me straight in the eye.
1000650436.korean: - 잠시 손가락을 꼼지락대던 메이는, 이내 나를 똑바로 바라봤다.

1000650438.english: Ugh... I finally said it. I'm more nervous than I thought I'd be.

1000650439.english: I was originally going to say this and then go first, but...
1000650439.korean: 원래 이 말 하고 나서 내가 먼저 하려고 했는데…

1000650440.english: ...the answer? You're not daydreaming again, are you?
1000650440.korean: …대답은? 또 딴 생각 하고 있는 거 아니지?

1000650441.english: - How can you think about something else in this situation?
1000650441.korean: - 이런 상황에서 어떻게 딴 생각을 할 수 있을까.

1000650442.english: - The girl who thought of herself as a weapon and wasn't even allowed to have personal feelings is now saying she likes me with all her might.
1000650442.korean: - 스스로를 무기라고 생각하고, 사적인 감정을 품는 것조차 허락받지 못했던 소녀가, 온 힘을 다해 좋아한다고 말해주고 있다.

1000650447.english: Huh? Oh?! Okay, just a moment!

1000650448.english: ...No. It's embarrassing, but that's not it.

1000650450.english: - May blushed and whispered in a barely audible voice.
1000650450.korean: - 메이는 얼굴을 붉히고 기어들어가는 목소리로 속삭였다.

1000650451.english: Hey, if we do it here, we won't be able to stay together until tomorrow or the day after tomorrow...
1000650451.korean: 여, 여기서 하면 내일이나 모레까지… 계속 같이 있을 수가 없잖아.

1000650452.english: ...There's also something prepared in the room - Aah?!

1000650455.english: - The May I picked up was literally as light as a feather.
1000650455.korean: - 안아든 메이는 말 그대로 깃털처럼 가벼웠다.

1000650459.english: - May's room, the consciousness that had been half-asleep was awakened again by a knock.
1000650459.korean: - 메이의 방, 반쯤 잠들었던 의식이 노크소리에 다시 깨어났다.

1000650460.english: - If someone were to come at this time...
1000650460.korean: - 지금 이 타이밍에 찾아올 사람이라고 하면…

1000650462.english: It was a pretty good life...

1000650463.english: - Am I mistaken...? It looks like Night Angel's body is becoming blurry.
1000650463.korean: - 착각인가... 나이트 앤젤의 몸이 흐릿해지는 것 같은데.

1000650468.english: I thought you were getting better, but you're still a dreamy girl next to the commander.
1000650468.korean: 좀 나아졌나 했더니, 여전히 사령관 옆에서는 꿈 많은 소녀군요.

1000650469.english: - I stroked May's cheek as she slept soundly.

1000650471.english: - Still sleep-talking, May tightly grasped my index finger and fell back asleep.
1000650471.korean: - 잠꼬대를 하던 메이는 내 검지 손가락을 꼬옥 쥔 채 다시 잠들었다.

1000650473.english: Anyway, please take good care of the captain. Also, please tell them not to worry about the Doom Bringer duties for the time being.
1000650473.korean: 어쨌든 대장을 잘 부탁드립니다. 당분간 둠 브링어 업무는 신경쓰지 말라고도 전해주세요.

1000650474.english: And since the commander is also off today...

1000650475.english: Is that so? That's just like the boss.

1000650477.english: - After exchanging a few more words, Night Angel went out into the hallway and quietly closed the door.
1000650477.korean: - 그렇게 몇 마디를 더 나누고, 나이트 앤젤은 복도로 나가 조용히 문을 닫았다.

1000650478.english: - Then I should get some sleep before May wakes up.
1000650478.korean: - 그럼 메이가 일어나기 전에 좀 눈을 붙여놔야겠군.

1000650479.english: - Not just because of the strict order to wait on me...
1000650479.korean: - 꼭 수발을 들라는 엄명 때문만이 아니라…

1000650480.english: - At least for today, I don't intend to let go of May either.
1000650480.korean: - 적어도 오늘 하루동안은, 나도 메이를 놓아줄 생각이 없으니까.

1000650484.english: Should I say I've gotten used to it, or that it's become natural...?

1000650489.english: No. Okay. I also want to be alone with May.
1000650489.korean: 아냐. 좋아. 나도 메이랑 단 둘이 있고 싶어.

1000650491.english: Is it okay to drink alcohol?

1000650494.english: Still, you're more composed than you used to be, aren't you?

1000650500.english: If you ask how it was...

1000650501.english: Did you, did you not like it...?

1000650503.english: I like it too. A lot.

1000650504.english: Yeah. I'll make sure it doesn't hurt.

1000650506.english: Hold on tight, I'm going to run.

1000650509.english: ... On the way, May said she wanted to wear it and do it.

1000650510.english: Isn't it good? Even things like this.

1000650511.english: I was already feeling like I couldn't walk, and on top of that, I received a stern order to wait on you all day today.
1000650511.korean: 안그래도 못 걸을 것 같다고, 오늘 하루 수발들라는 엄명을 받았어.

1000650514.english: Hmm... don't get the wrong idea just because we got a bit closer, I'm not that refined. I've seen all sorts of sights and shenanigans~ ...You still like me considering that? ...Our Hot Pack really grew up~ Give it here. Keh, perfect fit. Good. From today it's not Hot Pack but boyfriend, okay?
1000650514.korean: 흐음... 조금 친해졌다고 뭘 착각하는 것 같은데, 나 그렇게 고상한 애 아니거든.&n볼 꼴, 못 볼 꼴 다 보면서 살아왔다고~ ...그것까지 감안해서 내가 좋아?&n...우리 핫팩 진짜 많이 컸다~ 이리 줘봐. 킥, 딱 맞네. 좋아. 오늘부터는 핫팩이 아니라 남친이지?​

1000650515.english: Have you fallen for Alvis’ cool looks? Hmm~ What should I do? Bodyguards must never fall in love... hehe. But with the Commander it’s okay! Alvis will stick close to the Commander from now on. Whatever danger comes to the Commander, Alvis will protect you!
1000650515.korean: 알비스의 멋진 모습에 반해버린 거야? 으음~ 어떡하지? 보디가드는 절대 사랑에 빠지면&n안 된다고 했는데... 히히힛. 사령관님이면 괜찮아! 알비스는 앞으로도 사령관님이랑 꼭 붙어 다닐 거야.&n사령관님에게 어떤 위험이 오더라도 알비스가 지켜줄게!

1000650516.english: I tried to express my feelings to the Commander but didn’t know how and acted recklessly. So I suppressed the wildness inside me and tried to seduce the Commander in a more elegant way… But now that I’ve been confessed to, I can’t hold back anymore. Hehe. Then... for tonight, I’ll wake all of myself without restraint, okay?
1000650516.korean: 사령관에게 내 마음을 표현하려고 했지만 어떻게 해야 할지 모르고 저돌적으로만 행동했지.&n그래서 내 안의 야성을 억누르고, 더 우아하게 변한 모습으로 사령관을 유혹하려고 했는데…&n이렇게 고백을 받으면 더 이상 억누르지 못하겠는걸? 후후. 그럼... 오늘 밤만큼은 참지 않고 내 모든 걸 깨워버려도 괜찮겠지?

1000650517.english: Why are Ironworm Beasts running wild so much these days?
1000650517.korean: 요즘 왜 이렇게 철충들이 날뛰는 거야?

1000650518.english: Well, it's convenient that they're fighting amongst themselves, but...

1000650519.english: ...... Has it already been over a month since we broke up?

1000650520.english: Ha, it's not as big a deal as I thought.

1000650523.english: Hurry up and move! Throw it all away!

1000650525.english: The commander's order is to abandon everything, supplies or whatever, and come with just your body!
1000650525.korean: 물자든 뭐든 전부 버리고 몸만 오라는 사령관님 명령이야!

1000650526.english: Hurry and move to the assembly point!

1000650527.english: Those guys are definitely from the Orca...

1000650528.english: What is it? Are you evacuating?

1000650531.english: Can you hold out until we set sail the day after tomorrow?

1000650532.english: Ironworm swarm approaching from the west has been completely wiped out, giving us some breathing room!
1000650532.korean: 서쪽에서 접근하던 철충 무리가 전멸해서 여유가 생겼어요!

1000650533.english: So they fight among themselves too...

1000650534.english: The personnel who have some free time will go to meet the members who are still on their way to the port. Hurry!
1000650534.korean: 여유가 생긴 인원은 아직 항구로 오는 중인 대원들을 마중 나간다. 서둘러!

1000650536.english: What are you talking about, fighting among themselves? The reward for helping...

1000650538.english: ... I've done all I can. We're almost out of bombs, and the rest is up to them. Just...
1000650538.korean: ...난 할 만큼 했어. 폭탄도 거의 다 떨어졌고, 나머지는 쟤들 알아서 하겠지. 그냥-

1000650539.english: Hey~ Wow, so it really was you, JangHwa?

1000650541.english: Someone sent a Hound emergency join request signal through the public channel, and I was skeptical, but...
1000650541.korean: 누가 공개 채널로 하운드 긴급 합류 요청 신호를 보내길래 설마설마했는데~

1000650544.english: Hmm... Seeing the look of surprise on their face when they saw me, it seems they were there after all.
1000650544.korean: 흐음... 날 보고 반가운 표정을 지었던 걸 보니까 있긴 있었나 본데.

1000650547.english: Of course not. Just a moment ago, you looked like you were going crazy with joy.
1000650547.korean: 없기는. 좀 전까지 반가워서 미치겠다는 얼굴이었는데.

1000650549.english: You're strange too, tho. Back then, it was definitely...

1000650550.english: Why are you bringing up the past, you idiot?
1000650550.korean: 뭘 예전 얘기를 하고 그래, 븅신아.

1000650551.english: Seeing how dirty your mouth is, it's definitely you.
1000650551.korean: 입 더러운 거 보니까 너 맞네.

1000650553.english: So why did you specifically call me? You're not just saying hello because of your personality, are you?
1000650553.korean: 그래서 왜 나만 콕 찝어서 호출했어? 네 성격에 안부인사나 하자는 건 아닐 테고.

1000650554.english: The fact that you came without a word means you know too, right?
1000650554.korean: 군말 없이 온 거 보면 너도 알고 있잖아.

1000650556.english: Keep your promise to help me once before.
1000650556.korean: 전에 나 한 번 도와준다던 약속, 지켜.

1000650557.english: Kick, you actually believed that? I was just being polite.
1000650557.korean: 킥, 그거 그냥 예의상 한 말인데 진짜 믿은 거야?

1000650558.english: Honestly, you didn't help me because you wanted to, did you?
1000650558.korean: 솔직히 너도 날 도와주고 싶어서 도와준 건 아니잖아?

1000650559.english: ... Ugh, fine. I knew this would happen anyway...!

1000650560.english: Ah, wait a minute, wait a minute. You should listen to the whole story. Insert the wire, and then...
1000650560.korean: 아아, 잠깐잠깐. 말은 끝까지 들어야지. 와이어 집어넣으시고~

1000650561.english: You or I, get that knife out of my side.

1000650563.english: Heave-ho. I added a little extra just because it felt a bit rude to say "Okay, got it!" without any explanation.
1000650563.korean: 읏차. 사족을 좀 붙인 건 그냥 산뜻하게 알았어~ 하기엔 좀 재수 없어서 그런 거야.

1000650565.english: I've had a bit of a change of heart.

1000650566.english: I was a bit confused about my identity, but...? I overcame it as if to show them.
1000650566.korean: 정체성에 좀 혼란을 겪었지만~? 보란 듯이 극복했지.

1000650568.english: What, are you interested? That's impossible.

1000650569.english: If you don't want to talk, don't.

1000650570.english: Kick. And again, I want to tell you~

1000650571.english: ... I just happened to see the records from when I was created.
1000650571.korean: ...그냥 어쩌다 날 만들 때의 기록을 봤거든.

1000650572.english: I saw a certain legend there. I saw that and did some thinking.
1000650572.korean: 거기 보니까 어떤 설화가 있더라. 그거 보고 생각을 좀 했어.

1000650573.english: So, I decided to change my lifestyle a bit. That's also why I decided to keep my promise.
1000650573.korean: 그래서 삶의 방식을 좀 바꾸기로 했지. 약속을 지키려고 마음먹은 것도 그것 때문이야.

1000650575.english: So what? As long as I'm happy, that's all that matters.

1000650576.english: So, what can I help you with?

1000650577.english: Speak quickly. I didn't bring many hand warmers.
1000650577.korean: 빨리 말해. 핫팩 얼마 안 갖고 왔으니까.

1000650578.english: ... Defend the area. And escort the target.

1000650580.english: The port and container ship are 2 kilometers east from here. The target of the escort is also the same.
1000650580.korean: 여기서 동쪽 2km 지점에 있는 항구와 컨테이너선. 호위 대상도 동일.

1000650581.english: Container ship, huh... What about the cargo?

1000650582.english: Over a thousand Bioroids and the supplies they will consume.
1000650582.korean: 바이오로이드 천여 명이랑 그들이 소비할 물자.

1000650584.english: Oh, so those are the ones I've been seeing around?

1000650586.english: Hmm, but you know... Isn't this enough for you to handle on your own?
1000650586.korean: 흠, 근데 말이야. 이정도면 너 혼자서도 충분하지 않아?

1000650588.english: They're lightly equipped, but they're all armed... At this level, it seems like we can definitely hold them off, even if there's some damage.
1000650588.korean: 가볍긴 하지만 전부 무장하고 있고... 이정도면 피해는 좀 있을지언정 충분히 막아낼 수 있어 보이는데.

1000650589.english: Once the ship is out at sea, nothing will happen...
1000650589.korean: 거기에 배가 바다로 나간 뒤엔 별 일 없을 거고...

1000650591.english: Okay, be honest. Why did you call me?
1000650591.korean: 자, 솔직히 말해. 난 왜 부른 거야?

1000650592.english: Even if I swore to keep every promise and live that way, even this obvious scheme...
1000650592.korean: 아무리 모든 약속을 지키고 살겠다고 맹세했어도, 이런 뻔히 보이는 꿍꿍이까지-

1000650595.english: ... I don't know either. Why I called you.

1000650596.english: Just... You're the only one who could be nearby, and you also promised to help before, so...
1000650596.korean: 그냥...  근처에 있을만한 건 너고, 전에 도와준다고 약속도 했으니까-

1000650599.english: You idiot, seriously. Oh, that's so funny.

1000650601.english: Heh heh, hey. You really don't know?

1000650604.english: Wow... Still, it's a relief that this older sister has sorted out her feelings to some extent.
1000650604.korean: 이야... 그래도 이 언니가 어느 정도 마음을 정리한 다음이라 다행이네.

1000650606.english: "What the hell are you talking about, you idiot?" she would have said as she walked away.

1000650607.english: You didn't even come, you idiot.

1000650609.english: Are you angry? If you call a woman who doesn't even know her own feelings an idiot, what else would you call her?
1000650609.korean: 열받아? 자기 마음도 모르는 년을 병신이라고 부르지 그럼 뭐라고 부르냐?

1000650611.english: Okay, I'll help you. Do your best.

1000650612.english: Instead, explain in great detail what happened in the meantime. Call?
1000650612.korean: 대신 그동안 무슨 일이 있었는지 아~주 상세하게 설명해. 콜?

1000650614.english: Then let's get moving right away. We'll deal with the Iron Blobs before they reach the harbor.
1000650614.korean: 그럼 바로 움직이자. 철충이 항구에 도착하기 전에 미리 처리할 거야.

1000650615.english: What? Were you supposed to take care of the target without the bodyguard knowing?
1000650615.korean: 뭐야. 혹시 호위 대상 몰래 처리해야 되는 거였어?

1000650616.english: Then I can't just help you for free. I'll have to set one condition.
1000650616.korean: 그러면 그냥은 못 도와주지. 조건 하나를 걸어야겠어.

1000650618.english: Could you get some hand warmers? And snacks. Ugh, I'm freezing to death.
1000650618.korean: 핫팩 좀 구해와. 간식거리하고. 으으, 얼어 디지겠네.

1000650620.english: ... You're not needed, so just get out.

1000650624.english: Until now the word 'Mnemosyne' was just the goddess of memory in myth and my recognition name. But when the administrator who came to my room called me Mnemosyne… that word became the greatest significance to me. ...Administrator. In my heart an unquantifiable emotion toward you is confirmed. Until I know what this feeling is... please stay by my side.
1000650624.korean: 지금껏 '므네모시네'라는 단어는 신화속 기억의 여신이자, 제 인식명일 뿐이었습니다.&n하지만 제 방에 찾아오신 관리자님이 저를 므네모시네라고 불러주셨을 때… 이 단어는 제게&n무엇보다도 큰 의미가 되었습니다. ...관리자님. 제 마음 속에서 관리자님을 향한 수치화 불가능한 감정이 확인됩니다.&n이 감정이 무엇인지 알 수 있을 때까지... 부디, 제 곁에 있어주세요.

1000650625.english: ...At first I wore rabbit ears out of simple curiosity, but after learning what a real rabbit is I underwent harsh training to become like one. I was happy to be able to show the results to the Commander… Good things do come in bunches. Now that we’re a true family... shall we make a big family like rabbits...? I’m ready.
1000650625.korean: ...처음엔 단순한 호기심 때문에 토끼귀를 썼던 건데, 진짜 토끼가 뭔지 알고 난 후부터&n똑같아질 수 있도록 혹독한 훈련을 받았죠. 그 성과를 사령관님에게 보여드릴 수 있게 돼서 기뻤는데…&n좋은 일은 겹쳐서 일어나네요. 이걸로 진정한 가족이 됐으니... 토끼처럼 대가족을 만들어 보실래요...? 저는 준비됐어요.​

1000650630.english: The three of us put our heads together, and yet no good ideas are coming out…
1000650630.korean: 세 명이 머리를 맞댔는데 아직도 괜찮은 아이디어가 안 나오다니...

1000650632.english: I can't take it, shall we all go swimming for a bit?
1000650632.korean: 안되겠어, 다 같이 수영이라도 하고 올까?

1000650633.english: If we move our bodies a little, maybe good ideas will come! Right, Neri?
1000650633.korean: 몸을 좀 움직이면 괜찮은 아이디어가 나올지도 몰라! 네리는 그래!

1000650634.english: Remember yesterday when we did that and everyone just crashed out?
1000650634.korean: 어제 그랬다가 다 같이 곯아떨어진 거, 기억 안 나?

1000650635.english: The vice commander had to attend the exchange meeting, so she left it to us…
1000650635.korean: 부함장님은 교류회에 참석하셔야 돼서 우리한테 맡기고 가셨고...

1000650636.english: If we don't start preparing soon… hmm…

1000650637.english: It might be a little risky.

1000650638.english: But, you know, Neri isn't really sure.

1000650639.english: What should we prepare to make the Commander happy? Will he be happy with what we like?
1000650639.korean: 뭘 준비해야 사령관이 기뻐할까? 우리가 좋아하는 걸 준비해도 기뻐할까?

1000650640.english: If it's just something we like… hmm…

1000650641.english: How about all of us lying on the bed? That's the most effective, right?
1000650641.korean: 우리 전부 침대에 누워있는 건 어때? 그게 제일 효과적이잖아.

1000650642.english: Kya-haha! The Commander wouldn't dislike it, right?

1000650645.english: Hmm~? I wonder what Undine is worried about~?

1000650647.english: It might just be a reward for us… so…
1000650647.korean: 우리한테만 포상이 되는 걸 수도 있어서... 그러니까...

1000650648.english: Hehe… I think I know. The last time with the Commander, Neri felt that too.
1000650648.korean: 헤헤... 뭔지 알 것 같아. 저번에 사령관이랑 있을 때 네리도 그런 느낌이 들었어.

1000650649.english: Feeling happier than the Commander… and feeling like I should repay him, right.
1000650649.korean: 사령관보다 더 행복해져서... 왠지 내가 보답해야 될 것 같은 거, 응.

1000650650.english: This time, we're the ones making the Commander happy!
1000650650.korean: 이번엔 우리가 사령관을 기쁘게 해주는 거니까!

1000650651.english: Well… isn't it too early to give up before even trying?
1000650651.korean: 글쎄... 해보기도 전에 포기하는 건 너무 이른 판단 아닐까.

1000650652.english: Last time, we were careless and gave the Commander the initiative, but if we prepare properly this time…!
1000650652.korean: 저번엔  방심해서 사령관에게 주도권을 넘겼지만, 이번에 우리가 제대로 준비하면...!

1000650653.english: I-I don't think I can do it.
1000650653.korean: 나, 난 못 할 거 같아.

1000650654.english: I can't imagine taking the initiative away from the Commander.
1000650654.korean: 사령관한테서 주도권을 가져오는 내가 상상되질 않아.

1000650655.english: What's with you, Undine, when did you lose confidence like that?
1000650655.korean: 뭐야~ 운디네, 언제부터 그렇게 자신 없어졌어.

1000650656.english: Ahaha! Neri also thinks she can't beat the Commander.
1000650656.korean: 아하핫! 네리도 사령관은 못 당할 거 같아.

1000650657.english: What about Thetis? Are you confident?

1000650659.english: …Shall we rethink it from the start?

1000650662.english: You scared me! Why are you yelling all of a sudden?
1000650662.korean: 깜짝이야! 갑자기 왜 큰소리를 내고 그래.

1000650663.english: Did you come up with a good idea?

1000650664.english: Heh! I just remembered something from the information storage area.
1000650664.korean: 흐흥! 생각해 보니, 정보 보관 구역에서 알아낸 게 있어.

1000650665.english: Apparently, humans used to love coffee a lot. Warm coffee, sweet desserts, and calm music were said to soothe the mind.
1000650665.korean: 옛날에 인간들은 커피를 되게 좋아했대. 따뜻한 커피, 달콤한 디저트, 그리고 잔잔한 음악이 마음을 진정시킨다던데.

1000650666.english: Isn't that the same in the captain's room?

1000650667.english: There's coffee there and music playing too.

1000650669.english: Kya-haha, it doesn't seem particularly special.
1000650669.korean: 꺄하핫, 별다른 특색이 없는 것 같은데.

1000650672.english: We open the cafe outdoors. I mean, an outdoor cafe!
1000650672.korean: 카페를 야외에서 여는 거지. 즉, 야외 카페라는 말씀!

1000650675.english: Neri, hearing "outdoors" gave me a good idea… how about decorating it like a ship to show our unique touch?
1000650675.korean: 네리, 야외라는 말 듣고 좋은 생각 났어... 우리 특색을 살려서 배 위처럼 꾸미는 거, 어때?!

1000650677.english: And just to be clear, you didn't just think of that now, Undine? Hmm~?
1000650677.korean: 그리고 혹시나 해서 묻는 건데 방금 생각해낸 건 아니지, 운디네? 으응~?

1000650678.english: O-Of course not! We've been thinking about it for a long time.
1000650678.korean: 다, 당연하지! 오랫동안 생각해 온 거야.

1000650679.english: Then what about our outfits? Should we wear our usual clothes?
1000650679.korean: 그럼 우리 옷은 어떻게 해? 평소처럼 입어?

1000650681.english: Right, maids! Even among cafes, maid cafes were extremely popular. We wear maid outfits and serve the Commander!
1000650681.korean: 그래, 메이드! 카페 중에서도 메이드 카페가 엄청 인기였었대. 우리가 메이드복을 입고 사령관을 접대하는 거야!

1000650682.english: Huh? Won't that overlap with Battle Maids?
1000650682.korean: 어? 그럼 배틀 메이드랑 겹치는 거 아니야?

1000650683.english: No, no need to worry about that. I just remembered a good reference I saw a little while ago.
1000650683.korean: 아니, 그 점은 걱정할 필요 없어. 나도 방금 얼마 전에 본 좋은 자료가 생각났거든.

1000650684.english: Even with the same maid outfits, if we do it like this… like this…
1000650684.korean: 같은 메이드복이라 해도 이렇게... 이렇게 하면...

1000650686.english: T-The area… this is very embarrassing, it's visible…
1000650686.korean: 며, 면적이... 이건 굉장히 부끄러워, 보이는데...

1000650687.english: Kya-haha, before the apocalypse, even these kinds of maid outfits were used to entice men. The bunny girl trend on the Orca was just special, not the only thing.
1000650687.korean: 꺄하핫, 멸망 전엔 이런 메이드복으로도 이성을 유혹했다더라구. 오르카 호에 유행 중인 바니걸만 특별했던 건 아니라는 말씀.

1000650688.english: This should be enough to look different from regular maids, right?
1000650688.korean: 이 정도면 충분히 메이드와 다른 컨셉으로 보이겠지?

1000650690.english: This is a little… too much…

1000650692.english: The exchange meeting just ended and I just got back.

1000650693.english: How's the idea meeting going? I also thought of a few things…
1000650693.korean: 아이디어 회의는 잘 돼가고 있나요? 저도 몇 가지 생각해 본 게 있는데...

1000650694.english: Vice Commander! You're here? We came up with a good idea, please take a look!
1000650694.korean: 부함장님! 왔어? 괜찮은 아이디어가 나왔는데 한번 봐줘!

1000650695.english: A ship-themed cafe with us in maid outfits, what do you think?
1000650695.korean: 메이드복 차림으로 선상 테마의 카페, 어떻게 생각하세요?

1000650696.english: Huh? A maid cafe? Hmm… there are already a lot of maids on the Orca…
1000650696.korean: 네? 메이드 카페요? 흐음... 이미 오르카 호에는 메이드 분들이 많아서...

1000650701.english: Y-Yeah, this might be a little too much…
1000650701.korean: 여, 역시 이건 좀 많이 갔...

1000650702.english: Even if it's a bit embarrassing, if it's for the Commander… it's really a great idea!
1000650702.korean: 조금 부끄럽긴 해도 사령관님을 위해서라면... 정말 좋은 아이디어예요!

1000650704.english: As expected, it was right to trust you all and leave it to you.

1000650705.english: The idea came from Undine, Vice Commander!

1000650706.english: An outdoor cafe… and maid outfits, so I also got a sudden flash of inspiration.
1000650706.korean: 야외에서 카페... 그리고 메이드복이라 그래서 저도 아이디어가 번뜩 떠올랐죠.

1000650709.english: …Hehe! Of course. I've been thinking about this idea for so long~
1000650709.korean: ...후훗! 물론이지. 내가 얼마나 오랫동안 고민해 온 아이디어인데~

1000650711.english: Do we have anyone among us who can cook?
1000650711.korean: 저희 중에 요리할 줄 아는 분이 있었나요?

1000650713.english: What should we do? If we can't make coffee or desserts, we can't run the cafe, right?
1000650713.korean: 어떡하지? 커피나 디저트를 못 만들면 카페도 못 하는 거 아냐?

1000650715.english: If no one can cook, it's impossible.
1000650715.korean: 요리할 줄 아는 사람이 없으면 불가능하네.

1000650717.english: Ah, now that I think about it, didn't Undine make a dessert for the Commander before?
1000650717.korean: 아, 그러고 보니 운디네가 예전에 사령관님을 위해서 디저트를 만든 적 있지 않나요?

1000650719.english: Right! You made a cheesecake during Christmas two years ago, didn't you?
1000650719.korean: 맞아! 재작년 크리스마스 때 치즈 케이크 만들었었지?

1000650720.english: Undine, you're actually good at cooking!

1000650722.english: Kya-haha! What the… Undine, why didn't you say anything until now?
1000650722.korean: 꺄하핫! 뭐야, 운디네. 여태 말 안 하고 뭐했어.

1000650723.english: No wonder… you considered that in your long-thought-out idea.
1000650723.korean: 어쩐지. 오랫동안 고민한 아이디어인데 그것까지 고려한 거였네.

1000650725.english: Of course I can cook. Leave the kitchen to me!
1000650725.korean: 당연히 요리할 줄 알지. 주방은 나한테 맡겨!

1000650727.english: Then Undine will handle coffee and desserts in the kitchen, and we'll take care of everything else.
1000650727.korean: 그럼 주방에서 커피랑 디저트는 운디네가 담당하고, 다른 건 저희가 맡도록 하죠.

1000650731.english: I think I left something behind. Can I go get it?
1000650731.korean: 제가 뭘 놓고 온 것 같은데 가지고 와도 될까요?

1000650733.english: Go anytime, Chef. Undine's role is crucial this time!
1000650733.korean: 얼마든지 다녀오세요, 주방장님. 이번에 운디네의 역할이 중요한 걸요!

1000650735.english: Ooooh, what should I do? I only know how to make cheesecake…
1000650735.korean: 어어어어떡하지. 난 치즈 케이크 밖에 만들 줄 모르는데...

1000650736.english: No, we're not opening immediately, and if we cram from now…
1000650736.korean: 아니야. 당장 개업하는 것도 아니고, 지금부터라도 벼락치기하면...

1000650738.english: <CAFE Horizon?> To be continued in the next story.

1000650740.english: The effort is admirable, but… this is as far as I can go…

1000650744.english: So Sergeant Efreeti, let's continue training.

1000650745.english: Training to become a true rabbit!

1000650748.english: Brownie, how are things on your end?

1000650749.english: This side is almost finished too! But it seems like there's nothing.
1000650749.korean: 이쪽도 거의 다 끝났지 말임다! 그런데 아무것도 없는 것 같슴다.

1000650750.english: Corporal Leprechaun, did you find something?
1000650750.korean: 레프리콘 상병님은 뭔가 발견한 게 있슴까?

1000650751.english: I only found a few cans and some wood.
1000650751.korean: 통조림 몇 개와 목재 몇 개 밖에 발견 못했어요.

1000650752.english: Certainly, even in a place like this, there are still traces of human habitation.
1000650752.korean: 확실히, 이런 곳이라도 사람이 살던 흔적은 남아있군요.

1000650753.english: The first base camp we found was great because it had a lot of food, but...
1000650753.korean: 처음 발견한 베이스 캠프에서는 식료품이 많아서 좋았는데...

1000650754.english: After that, only small things come out.
1000650754.korean: 그 뒤로 자잘한 것밖에 안 나오지 말임다.

1000650755.english: If you go to Europe, it will be much harder to obtain supplies than it is now.
1000650755.korean: 유럽으로 가면 지금보다 훨씬 물자를 조달하기 힘들 거예요.

1000650756.english: This is the last exploration where we can move freely, so let's do our best.
1000650756.korean: 편히 움직일 수 있는 마지막 탐색이니 최선을 다하죠.

1000650757.english: Hey everyone, did you find anything over here?
1000650757.korean: 여러분 이쪽에서는 뭔가 발견된 거 있나요?

1000650759.english: All that was found here were a few groceries and some lumber.
1000650759.korean: 여기에서 발견된 건 약간의 식료품과 목자재 밖에 없었어요.

1000650760.english: Did you find anything on Sergeant Silky's side?

1000650761.english: No, it's similar on our end too. There wasn't a big harvest.
1000650761.korean: 아뇨, 저희 쪽도 비슷해요. 큰 수확은 없네요.

1000650762.english: It's definitely better to go a bit further...
1000650762.korean: 역시 좀 더 멀리 나가보는 게...

1000650766.english: Isn't this a rabbit headband? It's incredibly cute, isn't it!
1000650766.korean: 이거 토끼 머리띠 아님까? 엄청 귀엽지 말임다!

1000650769.english: They say this was so popular with men before the apocalypse, I never thought I'd find it here.
1000650769.korean: 이게 멸망 전에 남자들한테 그렇게 인기였다던데, 여기서 발견할 줄 몰랐지 말임다.

1000650770.english: I don't have any special clothes, but wouldn't just a headband be somewhat effective?
1000650770.korean: 옷은 따로 없지만 머리띠만 있어도 어느 정도 효과를 보지 않겠슴까?

1000650771.english: The bunny ears headband...? Surely not just with that one thing...

1000650772.english: ... No, Brownie has a point too.

1000650774.english: I heard a story while transporting supplies to the 'Ark of Memory'.
1000650774.korean: 물자를 '기억의 방주'로 운송하며 들은 이야기가 있어요.

1000650775.english: According to records found in the information storage area, before the destruction, bunny girls were required to wear outfits that could definitely seduce the opposite sex.
1000650775.korean: 정보 보관 구역에서 발견된 기록에 의하면 멸망 전, 바니걸은 반드시 이성을 유혹할 수 있는 복장이래요.

1000650776.english: Some members are already busy making or finding bunny girl costumes.
1000650776.korean: 몇몇 대원들은 벌써 바니걸 의상을 만들거나 찾기 위해 바삐 움직이고 있어요.

1000650779.english: Although I can't show it to the commander during a mission, isn't it okay to just enjoy it a little?
1000650779.korean: 임무 중이라 사령관 각하에게 보여줄 수는 없어도, 기분 내는 것 정도는 괜찮지 않슴까?

1000650780.english: Why don't you try it once!

1000650781.english: I didn't realize there were so many supplies buried under my eyes...
1000650781.korean: 눈밑에 이렇게 많은 물자가 묻혀 있었다니...

1000650782.english: If I hadn't looked carefully, I would have missed it.

1000650783.english: First, I'll get help from others to finish moving it... Let's explore a bit more carefully from now on, okay?
1000650783.korean: 일단 다른 분들에게 도움을 받아서 마저 옮기고... 앞으로 좀 더 꼼꼼히 탐사를, 응?

1000650787.english: I, I'm fine with this. Would you like to try a brownie too?
1000650787.korean: 저, 저는 이거면 충분해요. 브라우니도 한번 써보실래요?

1000650789.english: Ta-da, what do you think? Am I prettier than usual?
1000650789.korean: 짠, 어떻슴까? 저 평소보다 더 예쁨까?

1000650790.english: The brownie is good because it's a brownie.

1000650792.english: Am I the only one whose reaction is strange?!

1000650794.english: So everyone was here. What are you doing?
1000650794.korean: 다들 여기 계셨군요. 뭘 하고 계시나요?

1000650796.english: On your back, that... That's amazing, Sergeant! Where did you find so many supplies?
1000650796.korean: 등에 그건... 대단하세요, 병장님! 어디서 그렇게 많은 물자를 찾으셨나요?

1000650797.english: I found it buried in the snow.
1000650797.korean: 눈 속에 파묻혀 있던 걸 발견했어요.

1000650798.english: We still have a lot of supplies we haven't been able to bring back, so we've come to ask for your help if you're willing...
1000650798.korean: 아직 가져오지 못한 물자가 많아서 괜찮다면 도움을 부탁드리러 왔는데...

1000650799.english: What's that in your hand, a bunny headband...?

1000650801.english: This is, um, that... I wasn't playing around...
1000650801.korean: 이건 저기, 그... 놀고 있었던 게 아니라...

1000650802.english: While searching for supplies... Ugh... I'm sorry, Sergeant.
1000650802.korean: 물자 탐색을 하던 중에... 아으... 죄송합니다, 병장님.

1000650803.english: It's okay, we can chat a little.
1000650803.korean: 괜찮아요, 가볍게 잡담 정도는 할 수도 있죠.

1000650804.english: You don't have to apologize for things like this with your family.
1000650804.korean: 가족끼리 이런 것 가지고 죄송해하지 않으셔도 돼요.

1000650805.english: Then, Sergeant Noom, would you like to try it too?

1000650807.english: But, but it's a bunny ear headband.

1000650808.english: Sergeant Noum would definitely be interested if she knew the effectiveness of the bunny girl outfit!
1000650808.korean: 노움 병장님도 바니걸 복장의 효능을 알면 분명 흥미가 생기실거지 말임다!

1000650809.english: The effectiveness of a bunny girl outfit?

1000650813.english: It's said that it was also often used at special events for starting a family!
1000650813.korean: 가족을 만드는 특별한 행사에서도 종종 사용됐다고 함다!

1000650816.english: Corporal Silky, is what Brownie said true?

1000650817.english: This is a story I haven't heard before either... But it doesn't seem like they're lying.
1000650817.korean: 이건 저도 못 들어본 이야기인데... 하지만 거짓말하는 걸로 보이진 않네요.

1000650818.english: You must have gotten the information from somewhere, but I'm not sure where...
1000650818.korean: 정보를 얻은 출처가 있을 텐데, 어딘지는 잘...

1000650819.english: If it's about creating a family...

1000650820.english: Well, for us, the only rational person is Commander... Then...

1000650821.english: What's the point of saying anything? It's exactly as you're thinking!

1000650822.english: Alright, alright! Why don't you try it once!

1000650823.english: I've been thinking about this for a while, but I think Sergeant Noum is weak when it comes to the word "family."
1000650823.korean: 예전부터 생각했던 건데, 노움 병장님은 가족이란 단어에 약하신 것 같아요.

1000650824.english: Because you place special significance on family. Sometimes you get hurt protecting us because of it...
1000650824.korean: 가족에 특별한 의미를 두고 계시니까요. 그것 때문에 저희를 보호하다 다치실 때도 있지만...

1000650825.english: That's what's good about Sergeant Gnome.
1000650825.korean: 그 점이 노움 병장님의 좋은 점이죠.

1000650826.english: Sergeant Silky, do you think the same way I do?

1000650828.english: It feels like something big is going to happen someday... That ominous feeling...
1000650828.korean: 언젠가 큰일 날 것 같은... 그런 불길한 예감이...

1000650829.english: Well, then, I'll try it too...

1000650830.english: What are you guys doing there...?

1000650833.english: Oh, Sergeant Efreeti! Did you come?

1000650834.english: Come to think of it, doesn't Sergeant Efreeti like rabbits too?
1000650834.korean: 그러고 보니 이프리트 병장님도 토끼 좋아하지 않슴까?

1000650835.english: I hear bunny girl outfits are trending, and they say men really like them!
1000650835.korean: 바니걸 복장이 유행하고 있다는데, 그게 남자한테 그렇게 좋다고 함다!

1000650836.english: Other people found this headband during their exploration.
1000650836.korean: 다른 분들께서 탐사 중에 이 머리띠를 발견하셨대요.

1000650837.english: How about it, Sergeant Efreeti, you come too...

1000650843.english: Just because they put on some rabbit ears, they're acting like they're actually a rabbit!
1000650843.korean: 고작 토끼귀를 썻다고 진짜 토끼라도 된 것 마냥...!

1000650844.english: You don't even know why rabbits have appeared in countless folktales since ancient times... And they didn't even know that people in the old days were so enthusiastic about the true power, cuteness, and perfection of rabbits...!
1000650844.korean: 토끼가 왜 옛날부터 수많은 설화에 등장했는지도 모르지... 진짜 토끼의 강력함과 귀여움, 그리고 완벽함에 옛날 사람들이 열광한 것도 모르고...!

1000650845.english: I never thought there would be someone in our unit who would be so happy and say I look like a rabbit just because I'm wearing a simple accessory like a headband...!
1000650845.korean: 머리띠 같은 악세사리 하나 꼈다고 토끼 같다며 좋아하는 애가 우리 부대에 있을 줄은 생각지도 못했는데...!

1000650847.english: Do you even know how great rabbits are...? Do you know why it's great...?
1000650847.korean: 토끼가 얼마나 위대한지 알기는 해...? 왜 대단한지 알아...?

1000650848.english: You don't even know what a rabbit is in the first place... Because it's pretty when used as a fashion item, they do it without even basic common sense...!
1000650848.korean: 애초에 토끼가 어떤 동물인지도 모르면서... 패션 아이템으로 사용하면 예쁘다는 이유로, 기초적인 상식도 없이...!

1000650849.english: It's a big mistake to think of rabbits as just pitiful prey...! Even rabbits use their front teeth and hind legs to fight for something as precious as their lives...
1000650849.korean: 토끼를 가여운 피식자라고만 생각하면 큰 오산이야...! 토끼도 앞니를 쓰고, 뒷발을 사용해서 목숨 같이 소중한 걸 위해 싸울 때가 있어...

1000650854.english: Take it off... If the exploration is finished, let's head back...

1000650855.english: I've never seen Sergeant Ifreet raise her voice like that before.
1000650855.korean: 이, 이프리트 병장님께서 저렇게 언성을 높인 건 처음 봐요.

1000650857.english: I was wearing a headband in front of someone who is truly passionate about rabbits, so...
1000650857.korean: 토끼에 진심인 분 앞에서 머리띠를 끼고 있었으니...

1000650858.english: But doesn't Sergeant-Major Efreeti also have rabbit ears?
1000650858.korean: 그런데 이프리트 병장님도 토끼귀를 달고 계시지 않나요?

1000650859.english: Last time, I saw them endlessly repairing it for months to achieve the perfect angle, thickness, and texture.
1000650859.korean: 저번에 몇 달 동안 완벽한 각도, 두께, 촉감을 구현하기 위해서 끝없이 수선하는 걸 봤어요.

1000650860.english: That's how much you love rabbits.
1000650860.korean: 그만큼 토끼에 각별한 애정을 가지고 계시죠.

1000650861.english: ... Just a moment. Please wait, Sergeant!

1000650862.english: I apologize, I don't even know what kind of animal a rabbit is... I was just trying to become a bunny girl to become part of the Commander's family.
1000650862.korean: 사과드릴게요, 전 토끼가 어떤 동물인지도 모르고... 단순히 사령관님과 가족이 되기 위해서 바니걸이 되려 했었어요.

1000650863.english: I'm the real bunny girl... No, I absolutely need the sergeant's help to become a rabbit.
1000650863.korean: 제가 진정한 바니걸... 아니, 토끼가 되기 위해선 병장님의 도움이 꼭 필요해요.

1000650864.english: ... I've seen countless people say the exact same thing as you.
1000650864.korean: ...너와 똑같은 말을 한 애들을 수도 없이 많이 봐왔지.

1000650866.english: I don't think I've heard of it.

1000650868.english: How many of them do you think became real rabbits...? There wasn't a single person...
1000650868.korean: 그 중 몇 명이 진정한 토끼가 됐다고 생각해...? 단 한명도 없었어...

1000650869.english: But someone like you, a rabbit who wasn't even the main target...
1000650869.korean: 그런데 너처럼 토끼가 본 목적도 아닌 애가-

1000650870.english: I'll admit my motives aren't pure. However!
1000650870.korean: 제 동기가 불순하단 건 인정할게요. 하지만!

1000650871.english: My desire to become a true rabbit, my will, is more earnest than anyone else's!
1000650871.korean: 진정한 토끼가 되겠다는 마음만큼은, 제 의지만큼은 누구보다 간절해요!

1000650876.english: It's going to be a thorny path...

1000650880.english: Can you overcome any trials and hardships that come your way...?
1000650880.korean: 어떤 시련과 고난이 주어져도 이겨낼 수 있어...?

1000650883.english: Okay... Then I'll just watch and see.

1000650884.english: Where that feeling will go from here.

1000650886.english: Until you become a true rabbit, absolutely!

1000650888.english: ... It's almost mealtime, should I tell the two of you?

1000650889.english: Before that, let's hide the headband first.

1000650893.english: Your voice is faint because you're running... That just goes to show you're out of breath...
1000650893.korean: 뛰면서 대답하는 소리가 작아... 호흡이 달린다는 반증이지...

1000650894.english: I think I need to strengthen my physical training more...
1000650894.korean: 체력 훈련을 더 강화해야 할 것 같은데...

1000650899.english: Snowdrift 5 meters to the left... Can you see it...?

1000650901.english: You're saying supplies are buried here...? No way...!

1000650903.english: In nature, where they are surrounded by enemies on all sides, rabbits have been able to survive because they have honed their five senses to a sharp degree...
1000650903.korean: 사방이 적으로 둘러싸인 자연에서 토끼가 살아남을 수 있었던 건 오감을 예리하게 갈고 닦았기 때문이야...

1000650904.english: Sharpen your senses... Feel it with your skin...

1000650905.english: Use all your senses to perceive the surrounding situation... Okay...
1000650905.korean: 사용할 수 있는 모든 감각을 동원해서 주변 상황을 인지해... 알겠지...

1000650910.english: Ugh... I'm doing my best, but...!

1000650911.english: You shouldn't just throw around the phrase "I did my best"...
1000650911.korean: 최선을 다했다는 말은 함부로 하는 게 아니야...

1000650912.english: What it really means to do your best is... It means persevering in training, whether it rains or snows.
1000650912.korean: 정말 최선을 다한다는 건... 비가 오든 눈이 오든 꿋꿋이 단련하는 걸 말하지...

1000650914.english: Your desire to become a true rabbit is...

1000650915.english: Is that... the best you can do?

1000650917.english: To become a true family with the commander... To become a true rabbit...!
1000650917.korean: 사령관님과 진정한 가족이 되기 위해서... 진정한 토끼가 되기 위해서...!

1000650922.english: It's mealtime. Master Sergeant Impet says to assemble.

1000650923.english: How about we finish training for today here?
1000650923.korean: 오늘 훈련은 여기까지 하시는 게 어떤가요?

1000650924.english: ... Has it already gotten this late?

1000650927.english: That's it for today's training... You can go and rest.
1000650927.korean: 오늘 훈련은 여기까지야... 가서 쉬어도 좋아.

1000650929.english: I myself feel that I am very lacking. At this rate, it will take years, if ever, to become a true rabbit.
1000650929.korean: 저 스스로도 많이 부족한 걸 체감하고 있어요. 이대로라면 몇 년이 걸려도 진정한 토끼가 될 수 없겠죠.

1000650930.english: So, Sergeant Efreeti. I know it's presumptuous, but would you please train me even during your personal time?
1000650930.korean: 그러니, 이프리트 병장님. 염치없지만 부디 개인정비 시간에도 절 훈련시켜주실 수 있으신가요.

1000650932.english: You must be tired, are you okay...?

1000650935.english: Okay, let's eat and then continue... But Sergeant Silky...
1000650935.korean: 좋아, 식사하고 계속하자... 그런데 실키 상병.

1000650938.english: It's the same menu the sergeant called "rice police" yesterday.
1000650938.korean: 어제 병장님이 밥경찰이라 했던 메뉴 그대로예요.

1000650942.english: You said you were training to become a true family, right...?
1000650942.korean: 진정한 가족이 되기 위해 훈련받는다고 했지...?

1000650943.english: Oh, yes! That's right. Even tho I'm just a private, if I could become a true family with the commander...
1000650943.korean: 아, 네! 맞아요. 일개 병사인 저지만 사령관님과 진정한 가족이 될 수 있다면...

1000650945.english: Are you not interested in other classes...?

1000650948.english: I'm sure I was on the Orca. There was...

1000650954.english: What do you mean, what's going on...?

1000650955.english: After eating the parfait I made, you were unconscious for a while. Are you okay?
1000650955.korean: 제가 만든 파르페를 드시고 나서 한동안 정신을 잃으셨어요. 괜찮으세요?

1000650957.english: Corporal Silky, was the expiration date on the ingredients a bit old? Corporal Efreeti's condition is strange.
1000650957.korean: 실키 상병, 혹시 재료의 유통기한이 좀 오래 됐던 건가요? 이프리트 병장님 상태가 이상해요.

1000650958.english: That's impossible. When we did a full inspection a few days ago, there were no issues with any of the items... right?
1000650958.korean: 그럴 리가요. 며칠 전에 전수검사했을 때는 전 품목 문제 없었는데...?

1000650960.english: No! It's okay... The parfait is fine, and I'll take care of the rest...
1000650960.korean: 아니! 괜찮아... 파르페에는 아무런 문제 없어, 나머지도 내가 처리할게...

1000650965.english: I can see my feet, and my movements are slow...

1000650971.english: I have supplies... Noom, you know you're distracted, right?
1000650971.korean: 물자 있어... 노움, 스스로도 집중 흐트러진 거 알지...

1000650972.english: I can't believe there was still something I missed...

1000650976.english: Yes, I've finished making everything here!

1000650978.english: It's delicious no matter how many times I eat it...

1000650980.english: Sergeant! You've fainted again. Are you okay?

1000650982.english: It wasn't bad this time either...

1000650984.english: Excuse me, Sergeants... Isn't this class completely unrelated to bunny girls?
1000650984.korean: 저기, 병장님들... 이건 바니걸이랑 전혀 관련 없는 수업 아닌가요?

1000650985.english: And as supplies gradually dwindled... The voucher doesn't match the actual item... Hmph...
1000650985.korean: 그리고 점점 물자가 소모돼서... 전표랑 실물이 맞지 않는... 히잉...

1000650986.english: What am I going to do during the next census...?

1000650988.english: Not yet, not yet...! The angle of my hand is still awkward...
1000650988.korean: 아직, 아직이야...! 아직도 손의 각도가 애매해...

1000650989.english: Focus... Focus all your nerves on the tips of your fingers and toes...
1000650989.korean: 집중해... 손가락 끝, 발가락 끝에 모든 신경을 집중해...

1000650993.english: ... I won't tell you to get up.

1000650994.english: It's been several days already... I even applied for the lotus lantern and trained...
1000650994.korean: 벌써 며칠 동안... 연등까지 신청해서 훈련했지...

1000650995.korean: 견딜 수 없는 피로가 쌓였을 거야...

1000650996.korean: 아니에요, 전 더 할 수 있...!

1000650998.english: ... Sometimes the heart doesn't follow the body.

1000650999.english: I understand how you feel... It's frustrating to not be able to do more when you know you can.
1000650999.korean: 그 마음, 알아... 더 할 수 있는데 못해서 분한 거...

1000651001.english: The effort is commendable, but... This is as far as I can go...

1000651005.english: So, Sergeant Efreeti, let's continue the training.

1000651006.english: Training to become a true rabbit!

1000651007.english: Trembling as if they were about to collapse at any moment...?

1000651008.korean: 네, 전 더 할 수 있어요...!

1000651009.english: It would be easier if I just collapsed and lay down in bed...?
1000651009.korean: 차라리 쓰러져서 침대에 누우면 편할 텐데...?

1000651010.english: I told you from the beginning...

1000651011.english: Even tho our starting points are different, what I aim for... At least when it comes to my determination to become a true rabbit, I'm more sincere than anyone else!
1000651011.korean: 비록 출발점은 다르더라도 제가 지향하는... 진정한 토끼가 되겠다는 마음가짐만큼은, 누구보다 진심이라는 걸요!

1000651012.english: The training hasn't even started yet... It's harder than what I've been doing, but can I hold on...?
1000651012.korean: 아직 훈련은 시작한 것도 아니야... 해왔던 것보다 더 힘든데 버틸 수 있겠어...?

1000651013.english: I never even considered giving up...

1000651014.english: A true family... To become a true rabbit...!
1000651014.korean: 진정한 가족... 진정한 토끼가 되기 위해서...!

1000651015.english: I'm ready to push past my limits!
1000651015.korean: 저는, 제 한계를 뛰어넘을 각오가 돼있어요!

1000651018.english: Although it's unlikely to happen again... As long as you don't give up...
1000651018.korean: 더는 그럴리 없지만... 네가 포기하지 않는 이상...

1000651019.english: I'll see it through to the end too... I'll be here to help you.

1000651023.english: I'll start over and do it right this time!

1000651025.english: The lantern festival is over, and we need to head back. Should I go and tell them?
1000651025.korean: 연등 끝나서 복귀해야 되는데, 제가 가서 말씀드림까?

1000651026.english: Right now, it's a bit... I'll tell you in a little while.

1000651027.english: Please, I hope this situation ends quickly...

1000651030.english: Now that I've completed all the training, I'm a rabbit myself...
1000651030.korean: 훈련을 전부 소화한 지금, 저는 한 마리의 토끼 그 자체...

1000651032.english: Okay... Then, let's give it a try...

1000651036.english: Wait, stop! Right where we just passed...!

1000651037.english: Emergency rations are buried, about 100 meters ahead. There are military supplies left!
1000651037.korean: 비상식량이 파묻혀있고, 이 앞으로 약 100미터. 군수품들이 남아있어요!

1000651041.english: I made it a little differently than before. A little sweeter! Enjoy your meal!
1000651041.korean: 이전과는 조금 다르게 만들어봤어요. 좀 더 달콤하게! 맛있게!

1000651042.english: ... What? ... It tastes even better now?

1000651043.english: This, I'll eat later... Now the last exam is really left...
1000651043.korean: 이, 이건 나중에 따로 먹고... 이젠 정말 마지막 시험이 남았구나...

1000651053.english: You're even perfect at pretending to be dead... Okay, Gnome...

1000651054.english: It's the perfect rabbit, itself... Congratulations, you worked hard...
1000651054.korean: 완벽한 토끼, 그 자체야... 축하해, 고생 많았어...

1000651058.english: Isn't that a bunny girl costume? Sergeant, where did you get this...?
1000651058.korean: 바니걸 의상 아닌가요? 병장님, 이걸 어디서...

1000651062.english: Corporal Efreeti, when exactly did you start doing this...?

1000651063.english: ... From the first time you requested training.

1000651064.english: Somehow, I feel like you could pull it off... I also cut back on sleep...
1000651064.korean: 왠지 너라면 해낼 것 같아서... 나도 잠을 줄였지...

1000651065.english: And today, I was right... You've proven it...
1000651065.korean: 그리고 오늘, 내 예상이 옳았단 걸... 네가 증명해냈구나...

1000651067.english: I haven't done anything for you... Sergeant, you've gone this far for me...!
1000651067.korean: 제가 해드린 게 없는데... 병장님은 저한테 이렇게까지...!

1000651068.english: The only way a disciple can repay their master is by growing into a fine person...
1000651068.korean: 제자가 스승에게 보답할 수 있는 건 훌륭히 성장하는 것뿐이야...

1000651069.english: In that sense, Gnome, you... You were the best student...
1000651069.korean: 그런 의미에서 노움, 넌... 최고의 제자였어...

1000651070.english: No, if Sergeant-Major hadn't led us...

1000651071.english: I... Oh, I would never have been able to be a rabbit...
1000651071.korean: 저는... 흑, 절대 토끼가 될 수 없었을 거예요...

1000651072.english: As the saying goes, "Truth will prevail."

1000651073.english: What will happen will definitely happen... If it were your will, you would have definitely become a rabbit even without my help... All I did was bring that time forward...
1000651073.korean: 일어날 일은 반드시 일어난다고... 네 의지라면, 내 도움이 없었어도 반드시 토끼가 됐을 거야... 내가 한 건 그 시기를 앞당긴 것뿐...

1000651074.english: Alright, get up... Go... Let's create a real family...
1000651074.korean: 자, 일어나... 가서... 진정한 가족을 만들도록 해...

1000651076.english: Thank you for everything you've done for me! Sergeant Efreeti!
1000651076.korean: 그동안, 신세 많이 졌습니다! 이프리트 병장님!

1000651079.english: Big fish should play in the big sea... Don't come back again...
1000651079.korean: 대어는 큰 바다에서 놀아야 하는 법... 두번 다시 돌아오지 마...

1000651080.english: I will definitely create a real family... Have lots of little Big Sis... So I can be happier than anyone else...!
1000651080.korean: 반드시 진정한 가족을 만들어서... 토끼 같은 자식들 많이 낳고... 누구보다 행복해져서...!

1000651081.english: All the effort you've put in so far should be rewarded... Understood, Sergeant Gnome...?
1000651081.korean: 그간 해온 노력 다 보답 받아야 해... 알겠지, 노움 병장...?

1000651083.english: Very occasionally, I'll come back to make parfaits. Thank you, Sergeant Efreeti...
1000651083.korean: 아주 가끔은, 파르페를 만들러 돌아올게요. 고마워요, 이프리트 병장님...

1000651084.english: To just say what you want and leave... You fool...
1000651084.korean: 끝까지 제 할 말만 하고 가기는... 바보 같은 녀석...

1000651085.english: ... It's always hardest when you have to say goodbye.

1000651086.english: You have to take care of yourself, Sergeant Gnome...

1000651088.english: ... Is it really that hard to become a bunny girl?

1000651089.english: It seems like other people are wearing these just fine without any issues...
1000651089.korean: 다른 분들은 이런 거 없이 잘만 입고 다니던 것 같던데...

1000651090.english: It ended with a happy ending, so there's nothing bad about that.
1000651090.korean: 해피 엔딩으로 끝났으니 나쁠 건 없죠.

1000651091.english: All that's left now is to replenish the supplies that don't match the inventory list... Whew... It's a relief that it's over now...
1000651091.korean: 남은 건 이제부터 재고표랑 차이나는 물자를 벌충하는 것뿐이네요... 후우... 지금이라도 끝나서 다행이에요...

1000651092.english: It's a difficult emotion to understand, but... It went well.
1000651092.korean: 이해하기 어려운 감성이긴 하지만... 잘 끝났군요.

1000651095.english: Sniffle... Those guys, secretly doing this kind of training without even reporting it to the higher-ups... No wonder you're exhausted during combat sports class.
1000651095.korean: 훌쩍... 녀석들, 간부한테 보고도 안하고 몰래 이런 훈련을... 이러니 전투체육 시간에 지쳐있지.

1000651096.english: Normally, this would be referred to the disciplinary committee, but...

1000651097.english: This much, I'll turn a blind eye to it.
1000651097.korean: 이 정도는 살짝, 내 선에서 눈 감아줄까.

1000651099.english: That Efreeti... The more I see it, the more it seems fitting for a non-commissioned officer.
1000651099.korean: 이프리트 녀석... 보면 볼수록 부사관에 걸맞단 말이야.

1000651100.english: Should I secretly get a fingerprint while they're sleeping?

1000651102.english: So, men are already halfway in love with women who are exceptionally beautiful... Heh heh.
1000651102.korean: 남성은 외모가 뛰어난 여성에게는 이미 마음이 반 이상 넘어가있다라니... 후훗.

1000651103.english: At that level, she's beautiful and has this superior body that's not easily attainable, so the commander is definitely-
1000651103.korean: 저 정도면 얼굴도 예쁘고~ 쉽게 가질 수 없는 이 우월한 신체라면 사령관님도 분명-

1000651104.english: It seems like it's increased more than last time... At this rate, it'll be hard to capture the commander's heart...
1000651104.korean: 저번보다 더 늘어난 것 같은데... 이래서야 사령관님의 마음을 사로잡기는 힘들 것 같고...

1000651105.english: Hmm... I need to diet properly.

1000651106.english: My younger sibling overcame their complex, so as their older sister, I can't just stay like this.
1000651106.korean: 동생도 콤플렉스를 극복했는데, 언니인 제가 이대로 있을 수는 없죠.

1000651107.english: First, let's see if there's any relevant data... This, this is the easy way, if possible...
1000651107.korean: 우선 관련된 자료가 있는지부터... 이, 이왕이면 쉬운 방법으로...

1000651109.english: Pilates? Yoga? Different sources have different opinions on whether it helps with dieting.
1000651109.korean: 필라테스? 요가? 자료마다 다이어트에 도움이 되는지 의견도 다르네요.

1000651110.english: I don't like having to move my body a lot and vigorously because it's tiring...
1000651110.korean: 몸을 크게, 많이 움직여야 하는 건 힘들어서 싫은데...

1000651111.english: The commander said he doesn't care, but I want to look pretty.
1000651111.korean: 사령관님은 신경쓰지 않는다고 말씀했지만, 제가 예쁘게 보이고 싶은 걸요.

1000651112.english: If I work hard and show you how I've changed, then~

1000651113.english: Then the commander who fell for my charm... Heh heh...
1000651113.korean: 그러면 제 매력에 빠진 사령관님이... 후후...

1000651116.english: ... Ahem. As I say every time, please don't just suddenly appear.

1000651118.english: I was looking for the song before the destruction.

1000651120.english: Um, I'm also looking for something specific.
1000651120.korean: 저, 저도 따로 찾는 게 있어서요.

1000651121.english: ... What are you hiding behind your back?

1000651122.english: This, this is... It's just a personal interest of mine... It's a secret.
1000651122.korean: 이, 이건... 제 개인적인 관심사라서... 비밀이에요.

1000651123.english: Well, if you put it that way... I'll go look for the rest.
1000651123.korean: 뭐, 그렇게 말한다면야... 저는 마저 찾아보러 가겠습니다.

1000651124.english: Let me know if you need any help.

1000651125.english: Even if it's family, getting caught doing something like this is a bit... Let's hurry.
1000651125.korean: 가족이라도 이런 걸 들키는 건 좀... 서두르죠.

1000651126.english: Let's see... are there any good diet methods-

1000651127.english: How to capture a man's heart? How to achieve a beautiful physique?
1000651127.korean: 남심을 사로잡는 방법? 아름다운 체형을 가꾸는 방법?

1000651128.english: Eek?! I told you not to just show up suddenly!

1000651129.english: Oh, really? So this is what you were looking for...
1000651129.korean: 호오. 이런 걸 찾고 있던 건가...

1000651130.english: What is it? I can look up something like this too, you know.
1000651130.korean: 뭔가요. 저도 이런 것쯤은 찾아볼 수도 있잖아요.

1000651131.english: If we use that hideous chest fat, it seems like we wouldn't need any of that...
1000651131.korean: 그 흉악한 흉부 지방을 이용하면 그런 게 없어도 될 것 같은데...

1000651132.english: Of course! Even the commander wouldn't be able to resist seeing my superior physique.
1000651132.korean: 그거야 당연하죠! 제 우월한 신체를 보면 사령관님도 못 견디시겠죠.

1000651133.english: But, but... It's a little... embarrassing for the commander to see my complexes.
1000651133.korean: 하, 하지만... 사령관님께 제 콤플렉스가 드러나는 건 조금...

1000651134.english: I only want to show the commander my perfect side.
1000651134.korean: 사령관님께는 완벽한 모습만 보여드리고 싶단 말이에요.

1000651135.english: Haa... Now that the short one is taken care of, is it the big-chested one this time?
1000651135.korean: 하아... 키 작은 쪽이 해결되니 이번에는 가슴 큰 쪽입니까.

1000651136.english: Please take a look. I never want to go through that terrible time again.
1000651136.korean: 좀 봐주시죠. 두 번 다시 그 끔찍한 시간을 보내고 싶지는 않은데요.

1000651137.english: I, I'll take care of my own work.
1000651137.korean: 제, 제 일은 제가 알아서 할게요.

1000651138.english: Come to think of it, Night Angel seems to have a good figure... There's not much excess fat...
1000651138.korean: 그러고 보니 나이트 앤젤, 몸매가 좋은 것 같은데... 군살도 적고...

1000651139.english: ... I had to develop my competitiveness in other areas, so I had no choice.
1000651139.korean: ...저는 다른 쪽으로 경쟁력을 키워야 했으니 그럴 수밖에요.

1000651140.english: Hey, um... Could you tell me that method too?
1000651140.korean: 호, 혹시... 그 방법을 제게도 알려줄 수 있을까요?

1000651141.english: My method might not be suitable for Stratto Angel.
1000651141.korean: 제 방법은 스트라토 엔젤과는 맞지 않을 수도 있는데요.

1000651142.english: So, what should I do...? Um... the map-
1000651142.korean: 그럼 제가 어떻게 해야 하는지... 그... 지도를-

1000651144.english: Please take it. It's an ancient optical storage device.

1000651145.english: Martial arts from the East and West. I heard it's a combination of taekwondo and boxing, and that it's quite fun...
1000651145.korean: 동서양의 무술. 태권도와 복싱을 합친 운동으로 상당히 재밌다던데...

1000651146.english: Since they'll definitely give up quickly if it's even a little bit hard, it's better to make it fun.
1000651146.korean: 분명 조금이라도 힘들면 금방 포기할 테니까, 재밌게 하는 편이 더 좋겠죠.

1000651147.english: I think that would be... But is there any way to know more details?
1000651147.korean: 아무래도 그러는 게... 그런데 자세한 내용이라던가 알 수 없을까요?

1000651148.english: Well... It's written that you should just follow along, but asking you to do it all by yourself is a bit...
1000651148.korean: 글쎄요. 따라만 하라고 기록되어 있기는 한데, 당신 혼자서 하라는 것은 좀...

1000651149.english: To keep an eye on things and make sure it's done properly, I'll stay with you for a while.
1000651149.korean: 제대로 하는지 감시도 할 겸, 당분간은 제가 같이 해드리죠.

1000651151.english: Hoo hoo. Are you finally trying to repay this older sister?
1000651151.korean: 후후. 드디어 이 언니에게 보답하려는 건가요?

1000651152.english: Tsk. Give it back. I was just trying to help...
1000651152.korean: 쯧. 도로 내놓으세요. 기껏 도와주려고 했더니...

1000651153.english: Well, it's just that... Thank you for your help.

1000651154.english: ... Let's start exercising tonight. I'll call you back later.
